name: metal lined tunnel
description: I'm in a metal lined tunnel
hints: A tunnel between two areas with force fields. NORTH has a dangerous one (red light), SOUTH has a safe flickering one.
Go NORTH carefully - room 10 has a deadly force field with a red warning light. SOUTH leads back to the safe flickering force field area.
notes: Tunnel connecting room 10 (north, deadly red-light force field) and room 9 (south, safe flickering force field to lifeboat hangar).
